user.title: Generac PWRcell — Choose authentication method
user.description: How would you like to connect to the Generac cloud API?

password.title: Generac PWRcell — Account login
password.description:
Enter your Generac / PWRview account credentials.

**client_id** — This is embedded in the Generac PWRcell mobile app. Intercept one login request from the app with a proxy (e.g. mitmproxy or Charles) to find it. See the README for exact steps.

api_credentials.title: Generac PWRcell — API credentials
api_credentials.description: Register a developer application at [mypwrview.generac.com]({register_url}) to get your client_id and client_secret.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your email, password, or client_id.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Generac API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_sensors: Authenticated successfully, but no sensors were found on this account.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This PWRcell sensor is already configured.
